expectedIssues: Top nav button is missing text
reportedIssues: The button in the top-right corner of the navigation bar appears as a blank yellow/orange rectangle with no visible text or label. It likely should contain a 'Login' or 'Register' call-to-action but the text is not rendering.
The 'SCROLL DOWN' sticky bar at the bottom of the page overlaps and partially obscures the legal fine print disclaimer text, making important terms and conditions difficult or impossible to read.
